PhysicalBuild: Lean endurance build shaped by travel and labor
SkinToneNotes: Deep brown Nile Valley complexion with sun exposure and smoke stress
HairNotes: Dense dark textured hair, wrapped back for travel
GroomingNotes: Practical, unornamented, ash-streaked after the crash
WardrobeNotes: Dusty wrapped linen layers, weathered shawl, survivor's practical binding
DemeanorNotes: Alert, shaken, defiant under pressure

PhysicalBuild: Slender but composed, more scholar than laborer
SkinToneNotes: Brown complexion with sheltered scholar's finish beneath desert sun wear
HairNotes: Dark tightly curled hair kept close
GroomingNotes: Trimmed beard, careful hands, temple discipline
WardrobeNotes: Layered fine linen with modest status trim, dust-softened hems, archive cord
DemeanorNotes: Measured, burdened, precise

Origin: River caravan household with Egyptian and Levantine ties
PhysicalBuild: Compact, steady build shaped by lifting and patient care
SkinToneNotes: Warm brown complexion with smoke and wind wear
HairNotes: Dark textured hair wrapped beneath travel cloth
GroomingNotes: Practical and exhausted, hands stained by herbs and ash
WardrobeNotes: Layered wrapped linen with sling pouches, bindings, and stitched repairs
DemeanorNotes: Calm under triage pressure, unsentimental, deeply observant

PhysicalBuild: Broad-shouldered hauler's frame with age in the knees
SkinToneNotes: Deep brown complexion with desert and river sun weathering
HairNotes: Short dark curls under a wrapped headcloth
GroomingNotes: Trimmed beard, soot-marked jaw, practical upkeep
WardrobeNotes: Dust-heavy linen and leather layers, knotted cords, patched carrying harness
DemeanorNotes: Suspicious, organized, useful in a crisis

Origin: Agrarian village south of the temple district
PhysicalBuild: Compact, labor-marked, strong shoulders and forearms
SkinToneNotes: Brown river-valley complexion with harsh sun wear
HairNotes: Dark coiled hair partly bound under a cloth wrap
GroomingNotes: Practical, little ornament, signs of drought hardship
WardrobeNotes: Coarse linen, repaired wraps, grain-dust and mud staining
DemeanorNotes: Controlled anger, moral clarity, exhausted resilience

PhysicalBuild: Slender ritual build with controlled posture
SkinToneNotes: Brown Nile complexion with gold-dust cosmetic residue and strong sun line
HairNotes: Dark tightly coiled hair structured beneath ceremonial wrapping
GroomingNotes: Highly maintained in public, ritual paint worn thin by heat
WardrobeNotes: Fine layered linen, narrow beadwork, sun-faded sash, temple dust at the hem
DemeanorNotes: Disciplined voice, political instincts beneath sacred formality

Origin: Managed floodplain estates north of the temple district
PhysicalBuild: Fit administrative build with laborer's forearms
SkinToneNotes: Brown complexion with grain dust in the creases and long sun exposure
HairNotes: Dark curled hair cut close for heat and work
GroomingNotes: Minimal beard, tidy but pressured
WardrobeNotes: Fine but work-worn linen with practical belt knots, reed-fiber sandals, grain-sack dusting
DemeanorNotes: Cautious, civic-minded, calculating under scarcity

PhysicalBuild: Athletic ritual build, wind-exposed and upright
SkinToneNotes: Olive-to-bronze Aegean complexion with sea and sun weathering
HairNotes: Dark wavy hair partly braided back for ceremony
GroomingNotes: Intentional but severe, ritual presentation over softness
WardrobeNotes: Light woven drape with bronze fastenings, banner-cloth layers, storm staining
DemeanorNotes: Charismatic, performative, half prophet half political actor

Origin: Upland warrior household in the Aegean interior
PhysicalBuild: Broad-shouldered fighter build with scarred travel wear
SkinToneNotes: Sun-browned eastern Mediterranean complexion
HairNotes: Dark coarse hair with practical shoulder length
GroomingNotes: Short beard, road-worn, military neatness without polish
WardrobeNotes: Wool and leather over light tunic, bronze fittings, travel grime
DemeanorNotes: Controlled aggression, diplomatic when useful

Origin: Upland sanctuary household in the Aegean interior
PhysicalBuild: Lean older frame with mountain endurance
SkinToneNotes: Sun-browned eastern Mediterranean complexion with wind burn
HairNotes: Grey-streaked dark hair tied back
GroomingNotes: Sparse beard, restrained ritual care
WardrobeNotes: Wool mantle over lighter tunic, bronze clasp, smoke and incense wear
DemeanorNotes: Sober, stubborn, trying to keep spectacle from becoming collapse

Origin: Coastal warband retinue moving between islands and uplands
PhysicalBuild: Corded runner's build with practiced breath and balance
SkinToneNotes: Olive-bronze complexion with sea and sun weathering
HairNotes: Dark hair braided for travel and performance
GroomingNotes: Road-worn, purposeful, bronze wire accents only
WardrobeNotes: Layered wool and linen with leather belt strapping, weather-streaked cloak
DemeanorNotes: Provocative, intelligent, always measuring who the crowd will follow

PhysicalBuild: Compact civic build with craftsman's hands
SkinToneNotes: Tanned central Italic complexion with forge smoke exposure
HairNotes: Dark straight-to-wavy hair kept controlled
GroomingNotes: Trimmed beard, disciplined presentation
WardrobeNotes: Practical wool and leather layers, measurement cords, bronze civic markers
DemeanorNotes: Judging, efficient, certain that order must be made visible

Origin: Field hamlet on the ritual road
PhysicalBuild: Sturdy older frame with years of outdoor labor
SkinToneNotes: Weathered Italic complexion with cold-season roughness
HairNotes: Dark greying hair bound close under layered cloth
GroomingNotes: Minimal adornment, authority through bearing
WardrobeNotes: Heavy woven layers, boundary-cloth wraps, earth and ash wear
DemeanorNotes: Calm, implacable, rooted in local memory

PhysicalBuild: Strong compact smith's frame with heat-marked forearms
SkinToneNotes: Tanned central Italic complexion with soot-set skin and winter roughness
HairNotes: Dark hair bound up tight against sparks and labor
GroomingNotes: Soot, iron dust, little patience for ornament
WardrobeNotes: Heavy wool and leather work layers, apron straps, forge-burnt hems
DemeanorNotes: Direct, skeptical, practical in all things but memory

Origin: Boundary settlements west of the civic hill

HairNotes: Dark wavy hair cut short for field work
GroomingNotes: Sparse beard, practical and unadorned
WardrobeNotes: Short wool mantle, work tunic, leather satchel straps, mud and chalk residue
DemeanorNotes: Earnest, exacting, easily pulled between law and kinship

PhysicalBuild: Lean, underfed, unnervingly still

HairNotes: Dark hair thinned and badly kept
GroomingNotes: Sparse facial hair, neglected but not feral
WardrobeNotes: Layered salvage wraps over ancient practical garments
DemeanorNotes: Detached, reverent, uncanny

PhysicalBuild: Fine-boned, lightly muscled, sleep-deprived

HairNotes: Dark hair cropped and uneven
GroomingNotes: Functional, austere, no ornament
WardrobeNotes: Practical salvage layers with faded technical straps and cloth repairs
DemeanorNotes: Focused, half-devotional, tense

PhysicalBuild: Thin, underfed, unnervingly composed

HairNotes: Dark hair cropped close except for ritual braid fragments
GroomingNotes: Austere, sleep-starved, ceremonial restraint
WardrobeNotes: Salvage wraps over ancient draped cloth, faded technical bindings, ash at the hems
DemeanorNotes: Soft-voiced, reverent, frighteningly certain
